case_title: BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. A CORP. VS. LOREN MOLLINER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ANTHONY L. HEAD IN SUPPORT OF MOTIOIN TO VACTAE ORDER REGARDING SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. A CORP.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-31-2002 CONTINUED TO SEP-18-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). JUL-31-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. A CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOLLNER, LOREN $1,561.08 PRINCIPAL, $390.27 ATTORNEY FEES, $299.81 INTEREST, $181.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,432.16, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
